title: Nar Hekka
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Nar_Hekka.jpg]] |name=Nar Hekka |region=[[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector= |system=[[Y'Toub system/Legends|Y'Toub system]] |coordinates=S-11 |xyz= |distance= |suns=2: *[[Y'Toub]] *[[Unidentified star (Nar Hekka)|Unidentified star]]''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' |orbited= |position=6 |moons=0 |routes=*[[Ootmian Pabol/Legends|''Ootmian Pabol'']] *[[Sheela Run]]{{TCWComicCite|6.13|The Guns of Nar Hekka}} |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type_I_atmospheres|Type I]] {{C|breathable}} |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Cold]] |gravity= |terrain=*Frozen [[Water/Legends|ice]] *Enormous hothouse [[Domed city/Legends|domes]] |water= |interest=[[Tagta the Hutt's palace]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=*[[Human/Legends|Human]] *[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] *[[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] *[[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] *Many other [[Species/Legends|species]] *[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |socialgroup= |language=*[[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] *[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports=[[Plant/Legends|Plants]] |exports= |affiliation=*[[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] *[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] }} {{Quote|I dunno… it's not worth my butt if the Imperials are lookin' for this ship of yours. What's she carrying?''"
"''That I cannot tell you. But I will tell you that if you deliver the ship and its contents safely to Tagta the Hutt, he will be pleased, and pleasing a Hutt Lord is generally considered to be a good thing for one's financial well-being. Tagta is Jiliac the Hutt's highest-ranking subordinate on Nar Hekka.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]]|}} '''Nar Hekka''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located barely beyond the edge of the [[Y'Toub system/Legends|Y'Toub system]], where it also [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] a [[Unidentified star (Nar Hekka)|dim red star]]. It was situated on the [[Ootmian Pabol/Legends|''Ootmian Pabol'']] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] between the worlds of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and [[Du Hutta]]. Nar Hekka also sat on the [[Sheela Run]]. ==Description== Nar Hekka was a [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] with little indigenous [[Plant/Legends|plant]] and animal life. Despite the hostile environment, [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] rectified this by erecting large hothouse [[Domed city/Legends|domes]] around their [[City/Legends|cities]] and planting foreign vegetation within. The domes had artificial wind generators to circulate the air around the many botanical gardens. Nar Hekka was the home and business headquarters of [[Tagta]] the Hutt, a subordinate to [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron|Jiliac]]. It was assumedly conquered by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'s subjugation of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], though the amount of botanical plant life on the planet may have granted it some concessions. It was [[Terraforming/Legends|vongformed]] by the Yuuzhan Vong. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{TCWComicCite|6.13|The Guns of Nar Hekka}} *''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{Mo}} *{{JournalCite|15|The Great Herdship Heist}} {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Nar Hekka |es=Nar Hekka |fr=Nar Hekka |hu=Nar Hekka |tr=Nar Hekka }} [[Category:Ice planets]] [[Category:Planets in Hutt Space]] [[Category:Type I atmosphere planets]] [[Category:Y'Toub system locations]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong planets]]
